high_severity_items.summary: Cushing crude oil inventories fell below 20 million barrels, approaching tank bottom levels, causing the WTI-Brent spread to turn negative and indicating extreme tightness in the mid-Continent crude oil market.

high_severity_items.summary: June import prices rose 0.3% monthly and 7.1% annually, driven by higher costs from China (0.9% monthly, biggest since 2008) and AI-related components like computers and semiconductors, despite falling energy costs. Fed officials signal further tightening amid broadening inflation.
